## Pull Request Summary

### 🎯 **Type of Change**
<!-- Select the type that best describes your PR -->
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🧪 Test improvements
- [ ] 🔧 Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] 🚀 Performance improvement
- [ ] 🌐 LLM provider integration

### 📝 **Description**
<!-- Provide a clear and concise description of your changes -->

**What does this PR do?**
<!-- Brief summary of the changes -->

**Why is this change needed?**
<!-- Explain the problem this solves or the value it adds -->

**How does it work?**
<!-- Describe the implementation approach -->

### 🔗 **Related Issues**
<!-- Link any related issues -->
- Fixes #<!-- issue number -->
- Addresses #<!-- issue number -->
- Related to #<!-- issue number -->

### 🧪 **Testing**

#### **Tests Added/Modified**
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] Example code tested
- [ ] Documentation examples verified

#### **Testing Performed**
<!-- Describe the testing you've done -->
- [ ] R CMD check passes locally
- [ ] All existing tests pass
- [ ] New functionality tested with real data
- [ ] Performance testing completed (if applicable)

**Test Environment:**
- R Version: <!-- e.g., 4.3.0 -->
- Operating System: <!-- e.g., macOS 13.1 -->
- LLM Models Tested: <!-- e.g., GPT-4o, Claude-3.5-Sonnet -->

### 📋 **Checklist**

#### **Code Quality**
- [ ] Code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] Self-review of the code completed
- [ ] Code is well-commented, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] No debugging code or console.log statements left in
- [ ] Error handling is appropriate and informative

#### **Documentation**
- [ ] Function documentation updated (Roxygen2 comments)
- [ ] README updated if needed
- [ ] Vignettes updated if applicable
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated with changes

#### **Compatibility**
- [ ] Changes are backward compatible
- [ ] No breaking changes to existing API
- [ ] New dependencies properly documented
- [ ] Version constraints updated if needed

### 🚀 **Performance Impact**

**For performance-related changes:**
- [ ] Benchmarking results included
- [ ] Memory usage impact assessed  
- [ ] API cost implications documented
- [ ] Scalability considerations addressed

### 🔒 **Security Considerations**

**For security-sensitive changes:**
- [ ] No API keys or sensitive data exposed
- [ ] Input validation implemented
- [ ] Secure communication protocols used
- [ ] No new security vulnerabilities introduced

### 📊 **Consensus Framework Impact**

**For changes affecting consensus methodology:**
- [ ] Impact on consensus accuracy assessed
- [ ] Uncertainty quantification still working
- [ ] Multi-model compatibility maintained
- [ ] Performance benchmarks updated

### 🌐 **LLM Provider Changes**

**For new LLM integrations:**
- [ ] Provider authentication implemented
- [ ] Error handling for provider-specific issues
- [ ] Rate limiting and cost optimization included
- [ ] Documentation for new provider added
- [ ] Integration tests with actual API calls

### 📸 **Screenshots/Examples**

<!-- Include screenshots for UI changes or code examples for new features -->

```r
# your_example_code_here()
```

### 🎯 **Deployment Considerations**

**For deployment-related changes:**
- [ ] Database migrations included (if applicable)
- [ ] Environment variable changes documented
- [ ] Deployment instructions updated
- [ ] Rollback plan documented
